2324400.name: Underground roof fall hazard assessment VR Training Free
2324400.description:
Underground roof fall hazard assessment VR Training

Train your professional skills in Underground roof fall hazard assessment VR Training safely and in full correspondence with international standards!
In the VR simulator, you will learn how to identify hazards around a tunnel face after blasting in mining or tunneling operations. This training will take you underground to investigate the area and determine whether or not further ground support measures are necessary, in addition to the ground support application by design.You will use proper tools and have proper feedback such as sounds, tool actions and cooperation with co-workers.

Underground roof fall hazard assessment VR Training was developed for professionals by professionals (including NEBOSH certified HSE). It is suitable for a wide variety of workers.
2324400.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯语*, 意大利语*, 孟加拉语*, 古吉拉特语*, 马来语*, 旁遮普语（古尔穆基语）*, 俄语*, 法语*, 德语*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*, 越南语*, 韩语*, 土耳其语*, 日语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
